title: Spanish Torta with Almond Crunch
description: A simple, crunchy Spanish-inspired sandwich with fresh ingredients.
instructions: Preheat a panini press or grill to medium-high heat.
Spread torta filling on one slice of bread.
Top with sliced almonds, lettuce, and tomato (if using).
Place the second slice of bread on top of the filling.
Cook in the panini press or grill for 3-4 minutes, or until the bread is toasted and the filling is heated through.
Cut the sandwich in half and serve immediately.
